de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.ccatch
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.statement
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor
contains classes representing visitors traversing the tree structure of Java programs.
de.uka.ilkd.key.pp
This package contains pretty-printing functionality used by the GUI and for saving proofs.

    CcatchNonstandardParameterDeclaration
    A "non-standard" parameter declaration of a Ccatch clause, e.g., "\Return".
